```python
import os
import json
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

os.makedirs("figures", exist_ok=True)

plt.rcParams.update({
    'font.size': 12,
    'axes.titlesize': 13,
    'axes.labelsize': 12,
    'xtick.labelsize': 11,
    'ytick.labelsize': 11,
    'legend.fontsize': 10,
    'figure.titlesize': 14,
    'savefig.dpi': 300,
    'savefig.bbox': 'tight',
    'axes.spines.top': False,
    'axes.spines.right': False,
    'axes.grid': True,
    'grid.alpha': 0.3,
    'figure.figsize': (15, 4.5)
})

def load_npy_safe(filename):
    paths = [filename, os.path.join("exp_results_npy_files", filename)]
    for p in paths:
        if os.path.exists(p):
            try:
                return np.load(p, allow_pickle=True)
            except Exception:
                pass
    return None

def apply_style(ax, xlabel, ylabel, title, y_log=False):
    ax.set_xlabel(xlabel.replace("_", " "), fontweight="bold")
    ax.set_ylabel(ylabel.replace("_", " "), fontweight="bold")
